purpose: Per-project PA obligated $ + project counts (and lastObligationDate).

fields.name: applicantId
fields.title: Applicant ID
fields.description: Unique Public Assistance applicant identification number

fields.name: applicationTitle
fields.title: Application Title
fields.description: Standard, non-unique (free form text) application title

fields.name: county
fields.title: County
fields.description: The name of a U.S. county, parish, borough, independent city or other political subdivision specifying the applicant location. Counties may not be available for tribal, territories or applicants lacking specified headquarter locations.

fields.name: countyCode
fields.title: County Code
fields.description: Unique identifier for a U.S. county; typically, this identifier makes up the last three digits of a five digit Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) Code

fields.name: damageCategory
fields.title: Damage Category Description
fields.description: Description of the type of work eligible for reimbursement through a Public Assistance grant. For a full listing of each category please go to https://www.fema.gov/assistance/public/program-overview

fields.name: damageCategoryCode
fields.title: Damage Category Code
fields.description: Code representing the type of work eligible for reimbursement through a Public Assistance grant; for a full listing of each category please go to https://www.fema.gov/assistance/public/program-overview

fields.name: damageCategoryDescrip
fields.title: Damage Category Description
fields.description: Damage category code related to the Damage Category Description

fields.name: dcc
fields.title: Damage Category Code
fields.description: Damage category code related to the Damage Category Description

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.title: Declaration Date
fields.description: Date the disaster was declared

fields.name: disasterNumber
fields.title: Disaster Number
fields.description: Sequentially assigned number used to designate an event or incident declared as a disaster. For more information on the disaster process visit https://www.fema.gov/disasters/how-declared

fields.name: federalShareObligated
fields.title: Federal Share Obligated
fields.description: The Public Assistance grant funding available to the grantee (State) in dollars, for sub-grantee's approved Project Worksheets

fields.name: firstObligationDate
fields.title: First Obligation Date
fields.description: Date the grant was initially obligated

fields.name: gmApplicantId
fields.title: GM Applicant Identifier
fields.description: The numeric applicant identification number used in GM that represents an applicant in a declaration.

fields.name: gmProjectId
fields.title: GM Project Identifier
fields.description: The numeric project identification number used in GM for individual projects.

fields.name: hash
fields.title: Hash
fields.description: MD5 Hash of the fields and values of the record

fields.name: id
fields.title: ID
fields.description: Unique ID assigned to the record

fields.name: incidentType
fields.title: Incident Type
fields.description: Type of incident such as fire or flood. The incident type will affect the types of assistance available. For more information on incident types, please visit: https://www.fema.gov

fields.name: lastObligationDate
fields.title: Last Obligation Date
fields.description: Date the grant was last obligated

fields.name: lastRefresh
fields.title: Last Refresh
fields.description: Date the record was last updated in the API data store

fields.name: mitigationAmount
fields.title: Mitigation Amount
fields.description: Public Assistance proposed amount that applies to 406 mitigation. Note: does not capture some HMP proposals in the cost lines. Some negative values may exist and are due to adjustments between mitigation costs and project costs, deobligations within versions, and incorrectly categorized mitigation cost lines.

fields.name: obligatedDate
fields.title: Latest Obligation Date
fields.description: Most recent date the grant had an obligation

fields.name: projectAmount
fields.title: Project Amount
fields.description: The estimated total cost of the Public Assistance grant project in dollars, without administrative costs. This amount is based on the damage survey.

fields.name: projectProcessStep
fields.title: Project Process Step
fields.description: The current process location of a project from formulation through closeout including pending stages, discontinuation and obligation.

fields.name: projectSize
fields.title: Project Size
fields.description: Projects are designated as Large or Small, which can affect a number of variables in case management (processing). Project size is determined by the eligible amount as set in the damage survey

fields.name: projectStatus
fields.title: Project Status
fields.description: An active or inactive status of the project

fields.name: pwNumber
fields.title: Project Worksheet Number
fields.description: Sequentially assigned number used to identify a unique project

fields.name: state
fields.title: State
fields.description: The name of a U.S. state or territory

fields.name: stateAbbreviation
fields.title: State Abbreviation
fields.description: Two-character unique identifier for a U.S. state or territory

fields.name: stateCode
fields.title: State Code
fields.description: Two-character unique identifier for a U.S. state or territory

fields.name: stateNumberCode
fields.title: State Number Code
fields.description: Unique identifier for a U.S. state or territory; this identifier makes up the first two digits of a five digit Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) Code

fields.name: totalObligated
fields.title: Total Obligated
fields.description: The federal share of the Public Assistance grant eligible project amount in dollars, plus grantee (State) and sub-grantee (applicant) administrative costs. The federal share is typically 75% of the total cost of the project
